name: N«Бng

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of N«Бng (nngg1234).

notes: Tuu (!Ui branch) click language of South Africa (N«Бng/N«Аuu), critically endangered. This is an honest PARTIAL skeleton: there is no single standardized community orthography, and the descriptive literature presents the inventory in phonetic transcription rather than a settled spelling. The five click places and the g-/n-/h-/x-/glottal accompaniment digraphs above follow general Khoisanist transcription convention and are plausible but not confirmed as official. Tone, the strident/pharyngealized vowel phonation, and many finer click airstream and phonation contrasts are not represented, so a substantial PER floor is expected.
